nameMeanings.name: Jesson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: shortened form of Jephson, from the Middle English personal name Geff, a pet form of Geoffrey (see Jeff ) + -son, with -f- assimilated to the following -s-. Compare Jepson .

English: habitational name from Jurston, in Chagford (Devon). The placename means ‘Jordan's settlement’, from the Middle English personal name Jordan (genitive Jordanes) + Middle English ton ‘town, village, settlement’.

variants.name: Jeff
meanings: English (West Midlands and northern England): from the personal name Geff, a pet form of Geoffrey; see Jeffrey .
Native American: adoption of the personal name Jeff (which can be of the same English origin as 1 above or a short form of the surname Jefferson used as a personal name) as a surname.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret T Jesson was born in 1367, in Beeston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Lord Thomas Beeston about 1386, in Peover Superior, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1409, at the age of 43.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret T Jesson родилась в 1367 г. в местности бистон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Thomas Beeston около 1386 г. в местности пеовир супириор, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1409 г. в возрасте 43 лет.
